## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes (Biome clean)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated (if applicable)
